raw_consumer_statement: We were charged by our credit card American Express XXXX $ for tickets which we did not purchase. We never travelled on those tickets and flights. On our credit card it shows XXXX tickets were purchased. I called XXXX XXXX They told me no tickets were issued for XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Tx flight s I noticed these fraudulent charges on XX/XX/2023 showing pending charges and immediately notified dispute department and fraud department of American Express. But we did purchase tickets from an airline agency XXXX ticket s on XX/XX/2023 which were legit charges for XXXX XXXX and we travelled XXXX Ohio to XXXX XXXX XXXX Tx to XXXX to XXXX XXXX to XXXX XXXX to XXXX XXXX XXXX to XXXX Ohio. This was our legitimate purchase and travel. American Express credit card informed me that because we shared our credit card information with just fly agency we were responsible for the fraudulent charges. Even though we notified American Express credit card company immediately when fraud charges appeared in our credit cards account as pending charges on XXXX online website. American Express failed to prove that the charges were incorrect and fraudulent and did nothing to stop from pending charges to be investigated and resolved.
